subcodes.title: Words spoken at Baltimore Hotel in Paris, 1913-05-16
subcodes.first_line: Whosoever schemes in this Cause will come to no good end. Above all other things we must be honest to our consciences and not dissimulate. We must not speak against each other
subcodes.subjects: @idle talk; backbiting; speaking ill of others, @stories; anecdotes, @the power of words; of speech, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @courtesy; culture [adab], @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
